content:
The template is not found. This suggests that the verify_template call may have succeeded but the template wasn't actually created or saved properly. The user uploaded a file called "scale-2-consumption-per-batch-2e5e27-pdf (4).pdf" but the template_id generated was "scale-2-consumption-per-batch-2e5e27-pdf-4-e58afa" which doesn't exist.

This could be a backend issue or the template creation failed silently. I should inform the user about this issue and ask them to try uploading the file again.
I'm encountering an issue with the template creation. The system indicates that the template wasn't properly saved after the PDF was processed. This appears to be a technical issue on my end.

Could you please try uploading the PDF file again? I'll make sure to properly create the template this time.
